notableEvents.label: Miguel Amaya GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Amaya grounds into a double play, third baseman Alec Bohm to second baseman Bryson Stott to first baseman Bryce Harper. Ian Happ scores. Moisés Ballesteros to 3rd. Michael Conforto out at 2nd. Miguel Amaya out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Amaya rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Amaya grounds into a double play, third baseman Alec Bohm to second baseman Bryson Stott to first baseman Bryce Harper. Ian Happ scores. Moisés Ballesteros to 3rd. Michael Conforto out at 2nd. Miguel Amaya out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Matt Shaw pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Matt Shaw pops out to second baseman Bryson Stott.

notableEvents.label: Matt Shaw pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Matt Shaw singles on a fly ball to center fielder Justin Crawford. Seiya Suzuki to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Corbin Martin on the pickoff attempt.
